name: Hoppity Pop Fizz
description: Hoppity Pop Fizz is the Easter counterpart of Pop Fizz who was available only in the months of April 2013 and 2014 on Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Hoppity Pop Fizz is the Easter counterpart of Pop Fizz who was available only in the months of April 2013 and 2014 on Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Hoppity Pop Fizz has come to the Skylands with spring in his steps!
personality: Hoppity Pop Fizz is described as having spring in his steps, suggesting a cheerful and seasonal disposition.

story.content: Hoppity Pop Fizz is the Easter counterpart of Pop Fizz who was available only in the months of April 2013 and 2014 on Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Hoppity Pop Fizz has come to the Skylands with spring in his steps!

trivia: Hoppity Pop Fizz, Lucky Boomer, Admiral Thumpback and Holiday Wash Buckler are the only Lost Islands exclusive Skylanders of 2013 without a specific house of their own.
Hoppity Pop Fizz is the first Easter themed variant.
gameplay: As an Alter Ego in Skylanders: Lost Islands, Hoppity Pop Fizz does not have traditional attacks but was available as a seasonal Skylander who could be found spreading the joy of Easter to Skylands.
